title: Voting neurons
hotkeyTooltip: This neuron is controlled by a different principal, but your account has been added as a hotkey. You can view the neuron and vote, but other operations are limited to the controller.
noFollowingWarning: Not following anyone yet. Set up following in the voting page.

followingStatus.tooltipWarning: This neuron's voting power will start decaying soon (or already is). Confirm following to keep earning rewards.
followingStatus.tooltipExpired: This neuron's following has been cleared and it is no longer earning maturity. Confirm following to restore it.
followingStatus.alertDescriptionOk: Your following is valid for {{duration}}. After that, voting power starts to decay until you confirm.
followingStatus.alertDescriptionWarning: Following will be cleared in {{duration}} unless you confirm. Voting power decays until then, reducing the rewards this neuron earns.
followingStatus.alertDescriptionExpired: Following was cleared by the protocol. This neuron stopped earning maturity. Confirm to restore voting power and following.
followingStatus.success: Following confirmed. Voting power and following are refreshed.
followingStatus.hotkeyNote: Confirming following is one of the few actions a hotkey can perform.

errors.failed: Failed to confirm following. Please try again.

empty.title: Start participating in governance
empty.description: Create your first neuron to turn ICP into voting power. Neurons participate in voting and mint rewards over time.
empty.helper: After creating a neuron, you can follow known neurons or vote directly on proposals.

errors.zeroBalance: You need ICP to lock. Please buy or deposit ICP first.
